source: Truckses et al. 1996 Protein Sci 5:1907-1916 doi:10.1002/pro.5560050917 (PMID 8880915)
note: His124->Leu makes staphylococcal nuclease about 1.9 kcal/mol MORE stable than the His124 wild type at pH 5.5 (sign convention: positive ddG = stabilized). Residue 124 is surface-exposed and part of the effect couples to a Pro117 cis/trans equilibrium shift, but the net single-substitution effect is stabilizing. This task deliberately breaks the 'mutations are destabilizing' prior so the suite tests direction discrimination, not a constant loss-of-function bias. WT His124 reference: PDB 1STN; H124L variant: PDB 1JOO.
